chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D-3633 of 2015 (Tarique Ali Mirani Vs. Chancellor through its Secretary & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on CMA No. 10225/2015. 2. For hearing of main case. 21-03-2024. Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Mustafa G.Abro, Assistant A.G, Sindh. ******** The petitioner by way of instant petition has sought for direction against the respondent to regularize his services as Lab Attendant. On being asked, learned counsel for the petitioner was fair enough to say that the service of the petitioner has since been dispensed with by the respondents. If it is so then, discontinued service of the petitioner could not be directed to be continued under the deception of regularization; consequently the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly together with listed application. Judge Judge Nasim/P.A
